title: JawiCraft Language Pack
description: A Jawi translation pack for Minecraft Java Edition!
body:
# JawiCraft Language Pack | Pek Bahasa JawiCraft |
ڤيک بهاس جاوي کرف‌ت **What does this project add? / Apa yang ditambahkan dalam projek ini? /
اڤ يڠ دتمبهکن دالم ڤروجيک اين؟**
- This project adds a new language called (Malay in) Jawi script (for versions prior to 1.19)
Projek ini menambah sebuah bahasa baharu yang dipanggil (Bahasa Melayu dalam) tulisan Jawi
ڤروجيک اين منمبه سبواه بهاس بهارو يڠ دڤڠݢيل (بهاس ملايو دالم) توليسن جاوي - Improves the in-game Jawi translations (for versions after 1.19)
Menambah baik terjemahan Jawi dalam permainan (untuk versi selepas 1.19)
منمبهباءيق ترجمهن جاوي دالم ڤرماءينن (اونتوق ۏرسي سلڤس 1.19) **What is Jawi? / Apa itu Jawi / اڤ ايت جاوي؟**
- Jawi is a writing system used in several parts of Southeast Asia to write several languages there (more in-depth info about it is here in [this Wikipedia article!](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jawi_script))
Jawi ialah sistem tulisan yang digunakan di beberapa tempat di Asia Tenggara untuk menulis beberapa bahasa di situ (info yang lebih mendalam ada di [artikel Wikipedia ini!](https://ms.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tulisan_Jawi))
جاوي اياله سيستم توليسن يڠ دݢوناکن دببراڤ تمڤت داسيا تڠݢارا اونتوق منوليس ببراڤ بهاس د سيتو (معلومت يڠ لبيه مندالم اد د[ارتيکل ويکيڤديا اين!](https://ms.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tulisan_Jawi)) --- **Available Versions / Versi Tersedia / ۏرسي ترسديا**
  | Minecraft Versions | Available? | | :------------------ | :------------: | | 1.21 (Tricky Trials Update)
1.20 (Trails & Tales Update) | ✔️* | | 1.19 (Wild Update)
1.18 (Cave & Cliffs Update - Part II)
1.17 (Caves & Cliffs Update - Part I)
1.16 (Nether Update)
1.15 (Buzzy Bees Update)
1.14 (Village & Pillage Update)
1.13 (Update Aquatic) | ✔️ | | 1.12 (World of Color Update)
1.11 (Exploration Update) | ✔️ | | 1.10 (Frostburn Update)
1.9 (Combat Update) | ✔️ | | 1.8 (Bountiful Update)
1.7 (Update That Changed The World) | ✔️ | \* \- Terjemahan bahasa Melayu bertulisan Rumi dan Jawi adalah sentiasa dikemas kini untuk semua versi sejak 1.19.3 ---
Want to pair this resource pack with other MCEM pack(s)?
Make sure it's in this exact order!

-> Senjata Melayu*
-> Busana Melayu*
-> BetterMalay Language Pack**
-> JawiCraft Language Pack**
-> Any pack you want to use, or, in this case, the default texture pack


* = Can be freely swapped
** = May only be swapped if you want to use the Jawi language option, since the splash text will not render correctly if not using it, especially on older versions
---
Check out other MCEM packs! / Jom tengok pek MCEM lainnya!
